differentials.name: congenital hearing deficit Developmental malformations affecting the EAC + middle ear may cause conductive hearing loss.
differentials.raw: congenital hearing deficit Developmental malformations affecting the EAC + middle ear may cause conductive hearing loss.

differentials.name: CHARGE syndrome
differentials.raw: CHARGE syndrome (= Coloboma, Heart defect, Atresia of nasal choanae, Retardation of growth ± development, Genital ± urinary abnormalities, Ear abnormalities and deafness)

context: Those affecting the membranous + bony labyrinth may result in sensorineural hearing loss (SN HL). Cause: (a)  nongenetic (b)  genetic ›  isolated ›  associated with: Location:  external ear, middle ear, inner ear
